requirement_topic.en: SEEG Grid Connection for BESS — 220/380 V 50 Hz System, ARSEE Licensing, and IEC 62933 Project-Specification Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: SEEG BESS并网——220/380 V 50 Hz系统、ARSEE许可及IEC 62933项目规格要求
requirement_topic.zht: SEEG BESS併網——220/380 V 50 Hz系統、ARSEE許可及IEC 62933項目規格要求

summary.en: SEEG (Société d'Energie et d'Eau du Gabon) is the historic concession holder for electricity generation, transmission, and distribution in Gabon under a government concession framework. Grid-connected BESS installations — whether utility-scale, commercial and industrial (C&I), or solar-hybrid for rural electrification — require SEEG grid-connection approval and technical review. ARSEE (Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Electricité), established under the 2011 Gabonese Electricity Code (Loi n°002/2011 portant Code de l'Electricité au Gabon), is the electricity sector regulator and must issue a licence or authorisation for electricity production and storage activities above prescribed thresholds. Gabon's grid operates at 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz — nominally the same voltage as China's national grid. However, grid stability, voltage tolerance bands, protection relay settings, and SCADA communication protocol requirements applicable to BESS differ by project and must be confirmed directly with SEEG and the project owner. Donor- and lender-financed projects (AfDB, World Bank, EU) typically require IEC 62933 series compliance (IEC 62933-2-1 unit parameters; IEC 62933-5-2 safety requirements) as a contractual condition. A publicly accessible SEEG or ARSEE technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection had not been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific technical requirements must be obtained directly from SEEG and ARSEE.
summary.zh: SEEG（加蓬能源与水务公司）是加蓬在政府特许权框架下电力生产、输配电的历史特许经营权持有人。并网BESS装置——无论是公用事业规模、工商业（C&I），还是农村电气化太阳能混合储能——均须取得SEEG并网批准和技术审查。ARSEE（电力行业监管局）依据2011年加蓬《电力法》（Loi n°002/2011 portant Code de l'Electricité au Gabon）设立，是电力行业监管机构，须就超过规定门槛的电力生产和储能活动颁发许可或授权。加蓬电网以50 Hz运行，单相220 V、三相380 V——名义上与中国国家电网电压相同。然而，适用于BESS的电网稳定性、电压容差范围、保护继电器整定值及SCADA通信协议要求因项目而异，须直接向SEEG和项目业主确认。捐助方和贷款方资助项目（非行、世行、欧盟）通常将IEC 62933系列合规（IEC 62933-2-1单元参数；IEC 62933-5-2安全要求）作为合同条件。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认SEEG或ARSEE公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属技术要求须直接向SEEG和ARSEE获取。
summary.zht: SEEG（加彭能源與水務公司）是加彭在政府特許權框架下電力生產、輸配電的歷史特許經營權持有人。併網BESS裝置——無論是公用事業規模、工商業（C&I），還是農村電氣化太陽能混合儲能——均須取得SEEG併網批准和技術審查。ARSEE（電力行業監管局）依據2011年加彭《電力法》（Loi n°002/2011 portant Code de l'Electricité au Gabon）設立，是電力行業監管機構，須就超過規定門檻的電力生產和儲能活動頒發許可或授權。加彭電網以50 Hz運行，單相220 V、三相380 V——名義上與中國國家電網電壓相同。然而，適用於BESS的電網穩定性、電壓容差範圍、保護繼電器整定值及SCADA通訊協議要求因項目而異，須直接向SEEG和項目業主確認。捐助方和貸款方資助項目（非行、世行、歐盟）通常將IEC 62933系列合規（IEC 62933-2-1單元參數；IEC 62933-5-2安全要求）作為合同條件。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認SEEG或ARSEE公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬技術要求須直接向SEEG和ARSEE獲取。

standards_or_laws: Loi n°002/2011 portant Code de l'Electricité au Gabon — Gabonese Electricity Code establishing ARSEE as electricity sector regulator and licensing authority
ARSEE — Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Electricité (Gabon electricity regulator; licensing/authorisation for grid-connected storage activities)
SEEG — Société d'Energie et d'Eau du Gabon (grid-connection approval authority; 220/380 V 50 Hz concession operator)
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification and donor/lender reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification and donor/lender reference)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase — the same nominal voltage as Gabon. While the grid voltage level is nominally identical, PCS protection settings, communication protocols, and fault-ride-through configurations validated for the Chinese grid must still be reviewed and confirmed for Gabon's specific grid stability conditions and SEEG/ARSEE project requirements before grid-connection testing.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网以50 Hz运行，单相220 V、三相380 V——与加蓬名义电压相同。尽管电网电压等级名义上相同，但在并网测试前，针对中国电网验证的PCS保护整定值、通信协议和故障穿越配置仍须针对加蓬特定电网稳定条件及SEEG/ARSEE项目要求进行审查和确认。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網以50 Hz運行，單相220 V、三相380 V——與加彭名義電壓相同。儘管電網電壓等級名義上相同，但在併網測試前，針對中國電網驗證的PCS保護整定值、通訊協議和故障穿越配置仍須針對加彭特定電網穩定條件及SEEG/ARSEE項目要求進行審查和確認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy SEEG grid-connection requirements or ARSEE licensing obligations in Gabon. Key points requiring attention: (a) ARSEE licensing — obtain the applicable ARSEE authorisation or licence for electricity storage activities before project commissioning; confirm licensing thresholds, required technical documentation, and timeline directly with ARSEE; (b) SEEG project-specific connection agreement — engage SEEG at the earliest project stage to obtain technical connection requirements, including protection relay settings, voltage/frequency tolerance bands, reactive power requirements, and SCADA/communication protocol specifications; (c) grid voltage compatibility — while Gabon's 220/380 V 50 Hz is nominally the same as China's grid, real-world grid quality in Gabon (voltage fluctuations, harmonic levels, frequency stability) may differ significantly from the Chinese grid conditions used for PCS factory acceptance testing; (d) IEC 62933 evidence — donor- and lender-financed projects require IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 evidence; Chinese GB/T 36558-2023 is not accepted as equivalent; (e) equatorial climate derating — BESS thermal management and PCS derating for Gabon's ambient conditions (25–34°C, 80–90% relative humidity) must be documented in the project technical submission to SEEG and ARSEE.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足加蓬SEEG并网要求或ARSEE许可义务。需注意的要点：（a）ARSEE许可——在项目调试前获得适用的储能活动ARSEE授权或许可；直接向ARSEE确认许可门槛、所需技术文件和时间表；（b）SEEG项目专属并网协议——在项目最早阶段与SEEG接触，获取技术并网要求，包括保护继电器整定值、电压/频率容差范围、无功功率要求及SCADA/通信协议规格；（c）电网电压兼容性——尽管加蓬220/380 V 50 Hz名义上与中国电网相同，但加蓬实际电网质量（电压波动、谐波水平、频率稳定性）可能与PCS出厂验收测试所用中国电网条件存在显著差异；（d）IEC 62933证据——捐助方和贷款方资助项目要求IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2证据；中国GB/T 36558-2023不被接受为等效依据；（e）赤道气候降额——BESS热管理及PCS针对加蓬环境条件（25–34°C、相对湿度80–90%）的降额，须在向SEEG和ARSEE提交的项目技术文件中记录说明。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足加彭SEEG併網要求或ARSEE許可義務。需注意的要點：（a）ARSEE許可——在項目調試前獲得適用的儲能活動ARSEE授權或許可；直接向ARSEE確認許可門檻、所需技術文件和時間表；（b）SEEG項目專屬併網協議——在項目最早階段與SEEG接觸，獲取技術併網要求，包括保護繼電器整定值、電壓/頻率容差範圍、無功功率要求及SCADA/通訊協議規格；（c）電網電壓相容性——儘管加彭220/380 V 50 Hz名義上與中國電網相同，但加彭實際電網質量（電壓波動、諧波水平、頻率穩定性）可能與PCS出廠驗收測試所用中國電網條件存在顯著差異；（d）IEC 62933證據——捐助方和貸款方資助項目要求IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2證據；中國GB/T 36558-2023不被接受為等效依據；（e）赤道氣候降額——BESS熱管理及PCS針對加彭環境條件（25–34°C、相對濕度80–90%）的降額，須在向SEEG和ARSEE提交的項目技術文件中記錄說明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ARSEE authorisation/licence required for grid-connected storage above prescribed thresholds; SEEG grid-connection approval required for all BESS tied to the national grid; specific BESS technical specifications not publicly confirmed as of dataset date — engage SEEG and ARSEE directly
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558-2023 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Gabon

source.publisher: ARSEE — Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Electricité (Gabon)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy SEEG grid-connection requirements or ARSEE licensing obligations in Gabon. Although Gabon's grid operates at the same nominal voltage as China (220/380 V, 50 Hz), PCS protection settings, ride-through configurations, and SCADA protocols must be confirmed with SEEG for each project. Obtain ARSEE authorisation before commissioning. Donor- and lender-financed projects must provide IEC 62933 series evidence — Chinese GB/T certificates are not accepted as equivalent. Document BESS thermal derating for Gabon's equatorial high-humidity climate in all project technical submissions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足加蓬SEEG并网要求或ARSEE许可义务。尽管加蓬电网名义电压与中国相同（220/380 V、50 Hz），但每个项目的PCS保护整定值、穿越配置及SCADA协议须与SEEG确认。在调试前取得ARSEE授权。捐助方和贷款方资助项目须提供IEC 62933系列证据——中国GB/T证书不被接受为等效依据。在所有项目技术文件中记录加蓬赤道高湿度气候下的BESS热降额情况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足加彭SEEG併網要求或ARSEE許可義務。儘管加彭電網名義電壓與中國相同（220/380 V、50 Hz），但每個項目的PCS保護整定值、穿越配置及SCADA協議須與SEEG確認。在調試前取得ARSEE授權。捐助方和貸款方資助項目須提供IEC 62933系列證據——中國GB/T證書不被接受為等效依據。在所有項目技術文件中記錄加彭赤道高濕度氣候下的BESS熱降額情況。
